common.noResults: No questions match the current filters.

index.title: Craft Perfect
index.subtitle: Create, manage, and export professional exams and assignments seamlessly with live LaTeX rendering.

workspace.title: Question Workspace
workspace.description: Search the bank, inspect answers, and build a paper in the same workspace.

addProblem.title: Add Problem
addProblem.description: Compose a new problem and instantly check formatting with a live LaTeX preview as you type.

latex.title: LaTeX Preview
latex.description: A quick sandbox. Type any LaTeX expression and see it rendered to verify math syntax.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the question bank and protected authoring tools.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register a teacher account for question authoring and test paper tools.

addProblem.title: Add Problem
addProblem.subtitle: Compose a new problem with real-time LaTeX preview.
addProblem.permissionMessage: You need the questions:write permission to create new problems.
addProblem.subject: Subject
addProblem.tagHint: Press Enter or click Add after each tag.
addProblem.questionTextHint: Use `$...$` for inline LaTeX and `$$...$$` for block LaTeX.
addProblem.essayHint: This controls the reserved writing area in the exported preview.
addProblem.noPermission: You do not have permission to create questions.

workspace.title: Question Bank Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Search the bank, inspect answers, and assemble a paper in one page. Questions now load from the backend API.
workspace.loginRequiredMessage: You need question bank access before opening the workspace.
workspace.bankSubtitle: Loaded from the backend question service.
workspace.paperSubtitle: Build directly from the filtered bank.
workspace.generateSubtitle: Use a genetic algorithm to compose a balanced paper from the question bank.
workspace.generateHint: Uses the current paper title, subject, duration, and total marks.
workspace.categorizedDesc: Questions are grouped as multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blank, and essay, with forward numbering across sections.
workspace.paperOrderDesc: Questions follow the order from the paper builder.
workspace.noQuestionsInPaper: No questions added yet. Add them from the bank on the left.

users.title: User Permissions
users.subtitle: Manage account roles for question authors, reviewers, and administrators.
users.accessRestrictedMessage: Only administrators can manage users and roles.

latex.title: Real-time LaTeX Preview
latex.subtitle: Type a LaTeX expression below and see it rendered instantly.
